summary: EXP-451 authored. 5 structured patches for HOL-STRESSTEST c2 (ISS-2284/2285/2286): P1 hero thesis reword to match verdict architecture; P2 worked-example paragraph after eg-falsifiability Condition 1 (Schumann 22.6 Hz template); P3 module caption pre-commitment framing + C2 sublabel ~1 nT discriminating-window detail; P4 inline operational definition for 4 silent failures; P5 stance statement reframed as conclusion-from-evidence (also closes HOL-NARRATIVE c2 overlap). 3 architectural items deferred for operator decision: DEFER-01 Genuine-Prediction-(pending) verdict category (analyst recommends post-eclipse); DEFER-02 module heading rename (analyst recommends keep current); DEFER-03 living-document acknowledgement (analyst recommends defer). All verdicts preserved unchanged — EXP is presentation-layer hardening, not verdict revision. review_class=deep-attack singleton. Cross-references: HOL-NARRATIVE c2 (P5 closes shared stance hole), HOL-TAXONOMY c2 (DEFER-01 overlaps with TAXONOMY architectural recommendation).
